`internal/harnesses/claude/stream_test.go:273` and `internal/harnesses/codex/runner_test.go:301` construct disagreement cases by appending transcript/status candidates in test code after reading the cassette. AC 6 asks replay tests to use sanitized cassettes with disagreeing source values, so the disagreement should be encoded in replay artifacts or exercised through a replay path that actually reads multiple source values from cassette data.
`go test ./...` did not pass during review. The observed failures were environmental (`/home/erik/.cache/go-build` read-only and `httptest` localhost sockets denied), but AC 8 requires passing test evidence, and `AGENT_HARNESS_RECORD=1 go test -tags=integration -run usage` was not verifiable in this unauthenticated environment.
